calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs And Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Donald Mahnke, Esq. 310-933-4271 Quill & Arrow LLP for Plaintiff.
Aarica Roberson, Esq. 213-623-4581 Suire Patton Briggs for Defendant.

Hearing is held. The Court comments and poses questions; resolve issue consisitent with the judges in the past, how similar/differ from 998 offers, state of the record
Mr. Mahnke presents arguments; novel issue, request for sanctions, 5k dollars
Ms. Roberson presents arguments; disagrees with Plaintiff, 5k fees submitted, rejected by office via email.

After full arguments, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.'s Motion To Tax Costs And Award Of Monetary Sanctions.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs And Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-22-2026 Continued To Feb-23-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.'s Motion To Tax Costs And Award Of Monetary Sanctions.

Continued on the court's own motion to be heard February 23, 2026.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
